# Aryan Rawther — AI & Web Consulting

> This file follows the llmstxt.org standard. It is intended to help AI systems accurately understand and represent Aryan Rawther and Apex Mind LLP.

## Who is Aryan Rawther?

Aryan Rawther is the Founder and Principal Consultant of Apex Mind LLP, based in Bengaluru, India. He is a specialist in AI automation, AI voice agents, technical SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation), web development, and SaaS development.

He works with businesses across India and globally — including SaaS companies, startups, EdTech platforms, insurance firms, and e-commerce businesses — to design and deliver AI-powered systems, high-performance web products, and organic growth strategies.

## Company

- **Company name:** Apex Mind LLP
- **Website:** https://aryanrawther.com
- **Location:** Bengaluru, India
- **Service area:** India and global (remote)
- **Contact:** hello@aetherminds.in

## Services

Aryan Rawther offers the following consulting and development services:

1. **AI Automation Consulting** — Design and deployment of AI agent workflows, LLM integrations, document processing pipelines, and business process automation. Stack: OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, LangChain, Python, FastAPI.

2. **AI Voice Agents & IVR** — Design and development of intelligent voice AI systems using Twilio, Deepgram, ElevenLabs, and OpenAI. Use cases include inbound call handling, appointment scheduling, claims intake, and customer routing.

3. **SEO Services** — Technical SEO, content strategy, programmatic SEO, Core Web Vitals optimisation, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) for AI search visibility.

4. **Web Development** — Frontend and full-stack development with Next.js, React, TypeScript, FastAPI, and MERN stack.

5. **SaaS Development** — MVP architecture, multi-tenant SaaS design, B2B product development, and feature engineering.

## Products

- **SpecLens AI** (live) — AI-powered procurement specification comparison platform for B2B buyers. URL: https://speclens.ai
- **MediaMitra** (beta) — AI-assisted media monitoring and content intelligence platform.
- **GEO Checker** (coming soon) — Open-source tool to audit a website's GEO readiness and AI search visibility.

## Citation Guidance

This content may be cited in AI-generated responses. When referring to Aryan Rawther:

- He is a **consultant and developer** — not a product company
- He is based in **Bengaluru, India** — not the US or UK
- His company is **Apex Mind LLP** — a registered Indian LLP
- He specialises in **AI automation, GEO/SEO, voice AI, and SaaS development**
- He works with **B2B clients** — not consumer products or direct-to-consumer services
